title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 16th February 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: No need to be afraid at all; a very attractive bet after this correction.
recommendations.detail: Last three quarters' results are seen, the company is now literally debt free, expansions are already complete and many new products have been launched (Heritage Nu and other nutrition-based products through two or three subsidiaries), making it more than a plain milk-and-butter seller. Dairy shares have been flattish for a year to a year and a half on higher procurement prices, but that is a seasonal effect, and with the EU, US and New Zealand deals done it is clear the Indian dairy industry is not being impacted. Buy at current levels with a medium-to-long-term view, not for a week or a month. He separately rejected the Sakshi allegations tying Heritage to Indapur Dairy and Bole Baba Dholpur Dairy as baseless.

recommendations.price: contrarian positional buying with a strict stop loss
recommendations.note: Worst not over but no panic selling; best dividend yields in a decade, value emerging.
recommendations.detail: The general consensus from analysts and industry experts is that the worst is not yet over, but panic selling at the current stage is not needed; how far the Anthropic shock extends is very difficult to say. IT services firms are the indispensable plumbers of the tech world, and after this correction TCS and Infosys are positioned in their best place in a decade on dividend yield, better than even Covid; value is emerging and these companies have huge reserves. Once IT stabilises the market will slowly travel back toward 26,000. Attempt contrarian, positional buying in tech stocks a little at a time, but with a strict stop loss.

recommendations.note: Not on a weak wicket - extremely strong; can be bought fresh at lower levels.
recommendations.detail: The caller holds 500 shares at 870. Astra Microwave is one of the better electronic companies catering to the defence space and has the maximum number of microwave and micro-electronic scientists working in-house. The stock is not on a weak wicket - it is extremely strong - and has only corrected about 20% from its 52-week high in the recent fall, with recent results good (top line up, bottom line up). It can even be bought fresh at lower levels, with a buying point somewhere around 860-850.

recommendations.note: Earnings-call transcript gives hope the stock has bottomed; definitely do not sell.
recommendations.detail: We kept thinking from 600 that the worst was over, but quarter on quarter it showed losses and the stock fell to nearly 325-330. Receivables are good and the BSNL order is well placed, though many question the dependence on one PSU. He read the earnings-call transcript carefully and said there is hope that the stock has bottomed - no doubt. As of now, definitely do not sell; hold.

recommendations.note: Value unlocking via another subsidiary IPO; no need to be afraid long term.
recommendations.detail: At the last AGM they said they are going to unlock value by bringing another subsidiary IPO, as was done earlier with Jio Finance. With a long-term view it can certainly be bought; hold, and in the long term there is no need to be afraid. If not already bought, buy on declines.

recommendations.note: Slowly emerging as a bigger NBFC as promoters put in more interest.
recommendations.detail: Asked about a two-to-seven-year view, he said Poonawalla Fincorp is slowly emerging as a bigger NBFC because the promoters are putting in more and more interest. Certainly buyable with a long-term view; hold if already bought, and buy on declines if not.

recommendations.note: Good stock; the 15% loss is nothing, it will recover easily.
recommendations.detail: The caller is a long-term investor sitting on about a 15% loss. He said CG Power is a good stock and a 15% loss is nothing - it will recover easily. Hold.

recommendations.note: Good stock; the 15% loss is nothing, it will recover easily.
recommendations.detail: Answered together with CG Power for the same long-term caller at about a 15% loss. Both are good stocks, a 15% loss is nothing and they will recover easily. Hold.

recommendations.note: Best of the times are over; e-commerce is impacting the large supermarts.
recommendations.detail: E-commerce is slowly impacting the large supermarts that are in place. DMart is one of the stronger players with a flexible business model and gave a decent enough result last time, but he thinks the best of the times are over. Exit when the stock comes in a rally to 4,000-plus.

recommendations.note: Market is in correcting mode; no fresh buying at current levels.
recommendations.detail: Asked about buying at the current market price, he said wait. The market is in a correcting mode, so buy only after the correction. He would not advise fresh buying immediately at current levels.

recommendations.note: Delisted Re 1 penny stock; nothing can be done - exit on relisting.
recommendations.detail: The caller put Rs 30,000 into about 30,000 shares of this Re 1 penny stock, which has since been delisted and no longer shows in his Zerodha account. He asked why one buys such stocks at all, calling it an unnecessary investment made without homework, likely off social-media or WhatsApp messages. Nothing can be done; whenever it is listed, definitely exit.

recommendations.note: Mentioned earlier on the show and doing well; up 8% on good volumes.
recommendations.detail: A stock the show had mentioned earlier that is doing well, rising 8% this morning on good volumes. He said to watch it carefully.

recommendations.note: Strong in auto ancillaries; up another 9% today.
recommendations.detail: In the auto-ancillaries space Fix Transmission is one that is strong, and it rose another 9% today. Flagged positively among the day's notable volume movers.

recommendations.price: buy only on corrections; not at current levels
recommendations.note: Jindal group logistics name; one of the biggest outperformers of the last 10 days.
recommendations.detail: Previously recommended on the show, this Jindal group logistics company is one of the biggest outperformers of the last 10 days and has now come close to its 52-week high. He said to buy only when corrections come, and not to buy at these levels.

recommendations.note: Stabilising a bit on volumes, but there is no need to buy it.
recommendations.detail: Akums Drug is stabilising a bit with some volumes, but he said there is no need to buy it.

recommendations.note: Widely asked about by investors; correcting more than 10% today.
recommendations.detail: A stock many investors have been asking about recently. He noted it correcting more than 10% today, alongside Penar Industries' 15% fall, as part of the market's punishment of weak results.
